name: Market Research Report Generator
description: Comprehensive market research: competitor analysis, trends, customer insights, and recommendations

steps.name: competitor-analysis
steps.prompt_template:
Analyze the key competitors in this market. Include their strengths, weaknesses, market share, and strategies:

Market: {{input}}

steps.name: market-trends
steps.prompt_template:
Identify and analyze current market trends, emerging technologies, and future predictions for this market:

Market: {{input}}

steps.name: customer-insights
steps.prompt_template:
Analyze customer behavior, preferences, pain points, and needs for this market:

Market: {{input}}

steps.name: swot-analysis
strategic-recommendations
compile-report
